case_title: ANNA MARIE SINGLETARY VS. RALPH SINGLETARY

docket_entries.description: (404)PERSON TO BE PROTECTED APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED DID NOT APPEAR. THE COURT FOUND THAT NOTICE HAD BEEN GIVEN AS REQUIRED BY LAW. THE C
OURT GRANTED A THREE YEAR RESTRAINING ORDER. PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED SHALL NOT CONTACT, MOLEST, ATTACK, STRIKE, THREATEN, ASSAULT, BATTER, TELEPHONE,
YARDS FROM PERSON TO BE PROTECTED, PERSON TO BE PROTECTED'S CHILDREN, PERSON TO BE PROTECTED'S RESIDENCE, PERSON TO BE PROTECTED'S WORKPLACE, AND THE
